title: Theme Management System
subtitle: Context API deep dive, this/call/apply/bind, and a production-grade global theme provider
prerequisites: week2 — fetch APIs, custom hooks, loading and error states from Days 8–11
week2 — Context API introduction and immutability from Day 12 shopping cart
week2 — dynamic routing and navigation from Day 13
day14 — machine coding review: product listing, search, filter, pagination, cart without references
expectedOutcome: Explain how this behaves in regular functions vs arrow functions
Use call, apply, and bind to control function context in interview scenarios
Type a React Context with TypeScript including function types for setters
Build a ThemeProvider with light, dark, and system modes at the app root
Extract a useTheme custom hook that any component can consume
Persist theme preference to localStorage and restore on reload
Explain Context vs props and when NOT to use Context
definitionOfDone: Light, dark, and system theme modes all work and update the UI
Theme preference persists across page reloads
ThemeProvider wraps the entire app at the correct tree level
useTheme hook is consumed by at least one UI control
Layout is responsive on mobile and desktop

tomorrowPreview.title: Todo Manager using Redux Toolkit
tomorrowPreview.summary: Tomorrow you will manage application state with Redux Toolkit — slices, actions, selectors, and immutable updates — and compare when Redux beats Context for complex state.
